title: Aussie artificial intelligence may give robots a leg up
description: A new, water-efficient artificial intelligence hub could help robots make important decisions without delay.
content:
A team of robots will soon be able to make better decisions and make them faster using on-site artificial intelligence developed for Australia's largest robotics research lab.

title: Stellaris Venture bets big on AI-as-a-service
description: Early-stage venture capital firm Stellaris Venture Partners is actively deploying capital from its $300 million third fund into Artificial Intelligence-as-a-Service (AIaaS) and "full-stack AI" startups.
content:

title: Sheep In The Box: Hirokazu Koreeda’s Curious Sci
description: A beautiful yet simple sci-fi story about using artificial intelligence to manage grief, Sheep in the Box hits all the right emotional notes.
